{"query":"Shohei Ohtani 300th career home run date opponent inning first Japanese-born MLB player milestone July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1891,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.timesleaderonline.com/sports/local-sports/2026/07/shohei-ohtani-hits-his-300th-career-homer-becoming-first-japanese-born-mlb-player-to-reach-mark/","title":"Shohei Ohtani Hits His 300th Career Homer, Becoming First Japanese-Born MLB Player To Reach Mark - The Times Leader","content":"By Associated Press July 9, 2026 2 min read
Los Angeles Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani watches a foul ball go out during the third inning of a baseball game against the Colorado Rockies, Tuesday, July 7, 2026, in Los Angeles.
LOS ANGELES (AP) -- Shohei Ohtani hit his 300th career homer on Tuesday night, a leadoff shot against Colorado Rockies pitcher Michael Lorenzen that made him the first Japanese-born player in the majors to reach the milestone.
The Los Angeles Dodgers’ two-way superstar blasted a 409-foot line drive to center on a 2-0 pitch for his 20th homer of the season.
Ohtani is the fifth-fastest in history to reach 300 and the 170th member of the club.
It took him 1,102 games between playing for the Los Angeles Angels and Dodgers; New York Yankees slugger Aaron Judge was the quickest at 955 games.
It was Ohtani’s 31st career leadoff homer and seventh this season.
He also homered in the Dodgers’ 8-7 victory in 11 innings on Monday night to highlight a 3-for-4 performance.
Roberts believes there’s a lot more homers within reach for Ohtani, who turned 32 last Sunday."},{"url":"https://www.mlb.com/video/ohtani-300th-hr","title":"Shohei Ohtani's 300th career home run (20) | 07/07/2026 | MLB.com","content":"MLB.comhttps://www.mlb.com · Jul 7, 2026MLB.comhttps://www.mlb.com · Jul 7, 20260:27Shohei Ohtani homers to left-center field in the bottom of the 1st inning, the 300th home run of his MLB career.
